data.body: Investigation (INTERMEDIATE, opus): Primary gap — REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md dispatches sampling/refactor-anomaly reviewers that call write-reviewer-findings.sh but has zero WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR propagation. Under worktree isolation + HUGE-tier routing, findings land in orchestrator artifacts while classifier telemetry lands in worktree — same failure shape as 21d7-b84a. Secondary gap — emit-commit-workflow-event.sh silently no-ops when WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR unset. ESCALATE: primary fix is LLM-behavioral prompt edit to REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md; requires user approval.
